case_title: HARB LEVY & WEILAND VS BECKER MACHINERY CO. INC.DBA CONSTRUCTION SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY HARB LEVY & WEILAND AS TO DEFENDANT BECKER MACHINERY CO. INC.DBA CONSTRUCTION SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BECKER MACHINERY CO. INC.DBA CONSTRUCTION SERVICES AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HARB LEVY & WEILAND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARB LEVY & WEILAND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BECKER MACHINERY CO. INC.DBA CONSTRUCTION SERVICES $1,060.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,075.00, DEFECT IN SERVICE WAIVED BY DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BECKER MACHINERY CO. INC.DBA CONSTRUCTION SERVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HARB LEVY & WEILAND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF HARB LEVY & WEILAND
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM DEFEND. REGARDING CASE BEING FILED TWICE FOR SAME OBLIGATION.
